theme: Craft an input pulse for a fixed filter chain
title: Precompensator: Shaping an Input Pulse for a Fixed Filter Cascade
strategies: trivial: emit the zero input (reproduces the do-nothing baseline)
greedy: causal inverse filtering (polynomial long division) then clip to the amplitude bound -- unstable, blows up on non-minimum-phase cascades
strong: regularized frequency-domain shaping via Tikhonov normal equations (H^T H + lam I) x = H^T y*, then project to the box -- trades match against energy
beyond strong: solve the box-constrained QP directly (projected gradient / active-set) to exploit active amplitude limits the single clip leaves on the table
